plan_snapshot: Phase 2: Frontend Core — Vue 3 + TypeScript + Pinia + Vite setup, component library, layout, stores, and UI

todo.title: Pinia stores (config, files, prompts, job, ui)
UI component library (Button, Input, Select, Checkbox, Modal, ProgressBar)
Settings panels + Prompt library + Log panel

integration_issues.description: global_variables.json references non-existent paths: 'app/services/file_service.py' should be 'backend/app/services/file_service.py', and 'app/etl/extractor.py' should be 'backend/app/etl/extractor.py'. Variables ARE used in code, just file paths are wrong.

architecture_notes: Clean layer separation: types → services → stores, no circular dependencies
All 5 Pinia stores (config, files, prompts, job, ui) correctly import from api.ts and type files
Component library (6 components + tests) is self-contained with proper Vue 3 Composition API patterns
Vite proxy config routes /api → localhost:8000 and /ws → ws://localhost:8000 as planned
App.vue is a scaffold placeholder — component integration happens in Phase 3 (Dashboard layout + File list)
recommendations: Fix file paths in docs/global_variables.json (ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS, DEFAULT_MAX_FILE_SIZE, OCR_AVAILABLE) to use 'backend/' prefix
Consider adding @deprecated markers for backend-only globals if frontend review scope is confirmed
report.summary: All 39 tests passed across 12 test files. TypeScript compilation clean (vue-tsc --noEmit exit 0). All 5 Phase 2 tasks completed with correct implementation matching the plan.

Task task-004 fix completed: job.test.ts rewritten with vi.hoisted() — mockConnect/mockDisconnect/mockSend now properly hoisted before vi.mock factory runs
